/usr/bin/cmake -E rm -f CMakeFiles/raylib.dir/objects.a
/usr/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-ar qc CMakeFiles/raylib.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles/raylib.dir/objects1.rsp
/usr/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-gcc -fno-strict-aliasing -Werror=implicit-function-declaration -Werror=pointer-arith  -shared -o libraylib.dll -Wl,--out-implib,libraylib.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,5,--minor-image-version,5 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles/raylib.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles/raylib.dir/linkLibs.rsp
